summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of SingleStore cluster diagnostics dashboard. All core functionality working perfectly including file upload, report parsing, dashboard navigation, and data visualization.
passed_tests: Backend API health check
Report upload via POST /api/reports/upload
Report processing and status transitions (processing -> ready)
All data retrieval endpoints (overview, nodes, storage, queries, logs, recommendations)
Report deletion functionality
Homepage loads with upload dropzone and reports table
File upload via UI dropzone with file chooser
Report list shows uploaded reports with correct status
Dashboard navigation from report list
All dashboard tabs (Overview, Nodes, Storage, Queries, Logs, Recommendations)
Cluster overview with metrics (10 nodes, 8L/2A, version 8.9.28)
Node map visualization with health indicators
Issues summary with critical and warning recommendations
Node health cards with memory/disk bars and sorting
Storage tab with databases table
Queries tab with pagination and sub-tabs
Logs tab with search functionality and severity filters
Recommendations tab with actionable findings
Back button navigation from dashboard to report list
Delete report functionality with confirmation dialog
Log search and filtering capabilities
Node sorting by hostname, memory, and disk usage

success_percentage.integration: 100% (complete workflow from upload to dashboard viewing)
